title: CT-8770

{{Quote|Multiple laser hits sent Koon's Jedi starfighter plunging into the heart of the bridge city, destroying a clone staging area (see casualty reports labeled CT-8770 through CT-8910).|Moff Marcellin Wessel in a report to Emperor Palpatine|<ref name="Order 66" />}}
'''CT-8770''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Order 66" /> Like the rest of their brethren, CT-8770 was a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meter]]–tall [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], and was born and raised on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to fight in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="DB Clone troopers" /> In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> during a [[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|battle]] on the planet [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]], CT-8770 was stationed in a clone [[Staging area/Legends|staging area]] in one of the planet's [[Bridge city/Legends|bridge cities]]. When [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued, a command that commanded all clones to [[Death/Legends|kill]] their [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]], and General [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon's]] [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptor]] was shot down, it crashed into the staging area, killing CT-8770<ref name="Order 66" /> and 140 other clone troopers.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|155|CT-8770, CT-8910}}</ref> [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Marcellin Wessel]] later [[Casualty Report: Order 66|reported]] on CT-8770's death to [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] of the newly [[Declaration of a New Order|proclaimed]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Order 66" />

==Behind the scenes==
CT-8770 was first mentioned in the article "[[Order 66: Destroy All Jedi]]," written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and published in [[Star Wars Insider 87|eighty-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine<ref name="Order 66" /> on [[April 17]], [[2006]].<ref name="MagazineDate">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20060406.html|text=Inside ''Star Wars Insider'' #87}}</ref>
